151.reason: [double free: p->link is NULL here, so Vertex[i].link is NULL, freeing NULL is safe but the loop above already freed all nodes except last one, then this line frees again the last node which was already set to NULL? Actually, after loop p points to last node (with p->link==NULL), then we break. Then we do free(Vertex[i].link) which is same as free(p). But p hasn't been freed yet. So it's okay. However, the real issue is in deletion logic below.]
